project.name: RAGFlow
project.stack: Flask backend, React/TypeScript frontend (UmiJS, Ant Design), Docker Compose, MySQL, Elasticsearch/Infinity, Redis, MinIO; iOS: SwiftUI, GRDB, EPUBKit, PDFKit, Accelerate

completed: Phase 1 complete: P1.1 Brave Search, P1.2 Additional Tools, P1.3 sys.query fix, P1.4 Docker stability, P1.5 Document processing, P1.6 Test coverage
Phase 2 fully scaffolded and building: NavigationSplitView, search, streaming, citations
P2 high-value features implemented and tested end-to-end:
- PDFKit: PDFParser.swift extracts text page-by-page grouped in 5-page sections
- EmbeddingService: Ollama nomic-embed-text + Accelerate/vDSP cosine similarity
- DatabaseService v2: embedding BLOB column, FTS5 standalone table with porter tokenizer
- RAGService: hybrid retrieval (FTS5 + vector re-ranking), PDF+ePub ingest routing
- ClaudeService: tool-use loop (brave_search + jina_reader via ToolService.swift)
- ChatView: typing indicator, stop button, DisclosureGroup citations, suggested prompts
- LibraryView: NavigationSplitView binding, embed progress, PDF file type support
Multi-KB support added (commit 9625ac951):
- KnowledgeBase model + DB migration v3 (knowledge_bases table, kbId on books)
- KBListView / KBListViewModel: create, rename, delete KBs; default 'My Library' protected
- ContentView: 3-column NavigationSplitView (KB sidebar → Library → Chat)
- All ingest, retrieval, chat scoped to kbId
- DEBUG seed data with 3 KBs and 7 books
P2.5 Brave Search wiring complete (commit bb4f98f97):
- braveSearchApiKey added to LLMConfig
- Keychain persistence in SettingsStore (brave_search_api_key)
- 'Agent Tools' SecureField section in SettingsView
- makeLLMService → ClaudeService(braveApiKey:) → ToolExecutor fully wired
Universal layout (commit 0d71a81ef):
- iPhone: TabView (Knowledge Bases + Settings tabs), PhoneKBListView → KBDetailView
- iPad: 3-column NavigationSplitView (KB sidebar / Library / Chat)
- OnboardingView 7-page tutorial with animations, skip, Get Started
- KBDetailView inner TabView: Chat first, Documents second
- .toolbar(.hidden, for: .tabBar) fixes double tab bar on iPhone
UX fixes batch (commit 01880afdd):
- Document-neutral language throughout (no 'book' language)
- confirmationDialog for import source (Browse Files / Import from URL / Cancel)
- .plainText, .md, .html, .xml, .json, .csv, .rtf added to file picker
- ingestText for TXT/MD; ingestHTML; ingestRTF added to RAGService
Multi-KB chat + expanded file types (commit 202010ce4):
- ChatViewModel: activeKBs[], addKB/removeKB, retrieveChunks across all active KBs
- ChatView: KB scope bar with tint chips + '+' menu to add KBs
- RAGService: HTML tag-strip, RTF NSAttributedString, CSV/TSV/JSON/JSONL/XML/YAML/code plain text
- LibraryView: expanded fileImporter allowedContentTypes
Delete confirmations (commit d9f664880):
- LibraryView/VM: requestDelete/confirmDelete/cancelDelete with confirmationDialog
- KBListView/VM + PhoneKBListView: same pattern for KB deletion
- Both swipe-to-delete and context menu now gated behind confirmation sheet
next_steps: Live testing prep — phased plan defined, execution pending:
Phase 1 (Device Prerequisites):
P1.1 — Info.plist: NSAppTransportSecurity (NSAllowsLocalNetworking=true) + NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription
P1.2 — Create Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset (1024x1024 source)
P1.3 — Code signing: set DEVELOPMENT_TEAM in Xcode (manual, user action)
Phase 2 (Safety Rails):
P2.1 — API key guard: ClaudeService guard !apiKey.isEmpty → throw .missingApiKey
P2.2 — 'No provider configured' inline banner in ChatView
P2.3 — Settings always accessible on iPad (not just in sidebar)
P2.4 — Reset Onboarding button in Settings (#if DEBUG)
Phase 3 (Chat History Persistence):
P3.1 — DB migration v4: messages + message_sources tables
P3.2 — ChatViewModel: load on init, save on completion, delete on clearConversation
P3.3 — Per-KB conversation isolation; multi-KB uses primary kbId
Phase 4 (Performance):
P4.1 — Move ingest off @MainActor → Task.detached(priority: .utility)
P4.2 — scanDocumentsFolder: run once per app session, not per LibraryViewModel.init
P4.3 — Chunking phase progress feedback ('Chunking page X of Y')
Phase 5 (Format Expansion):
P5.1 — DOCX via ZipFoundation (unzip → word/document.xml → strip XML)
P5.2 — XLSX via ZipFoundation (xl/sharedStrings.xml + sheet1.xml → TSV)
P5.3 — PPTX via ZipFoundation (ppt/slides/*.xml → strip XML)
P5.4 — EML basic MIME parsing (no library needed)
Phase 6 (Pre-Release Hardening):
P6.1 — Fresh install wipe test end-to-end
P6.2 — Replace silent try? with proper error propagation; fix try! migrate() crash risk
P6.3 — Version bump to 1.0.0 / build 1
P6.4 — PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy + ITSAppUsesNonExemptEncryption=NO for TestFlight

phase_status.P3_iOS_live_testing: PLANNED — phases 1-6 defined, not yet started

known_gaps.no_ats_exception: Ollama HTTP blocked on real device without NSAllowsLocalNetworking
known_gaps.chat_not_persisted: ChatViewModel.messages is in-memory only — lost on restart
known_gaps.no_api_key_guard: ClaudeService sends request even with empty key — gets 401
known_gaps.ingest_on_main_thread: @MainActor ingest blocks UI for large files
